Synthetic SDS Fixture: Dust Powder C
Supplier: Synthetic Fixture Laboratory
Revision: 2026-05-06

Section 2 - Hazard Identification
May form combustible dust concentrations in air. Dust may cause respiratory
irritation.

Section 5 - Fire Fighting Measures
Use water spray, foam, dry chemical, or carbon dioxide. Avoid high-pressure
water streams that may disperse dust.

Section 7 - Handling and Storage
Avoid generating dust. Ground and bond equipment during transfer. Keep container
closed when not in use.

Section 8 - Exposure Controls and Personal Protection
Use local exhaust ventilation at dust generation points. Wear a P2 particulate
respirator when dust control is insufficient. Wear safety glasses with side
shields.
